feedback.text: Hello! More and more companies that produce and distribute video games have started to revoke access to the games that we have previously purchased. I think this is very unfair to the consumers and it doesn't work like this in any other area of business. Here is a long list of games that have either already been destroyed by the company releasing the game or are at risk of being destroyed in the future: https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list Best regards, David
